name: Almond Lace Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsalted butter or margarine, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly butter and flour at least two baking sheets.
3. In a large sauté pan, combine all ingredients in a food processor.
4. Stir over low heat with a wooden spoon until the butter melts and the ingredients are well mixed.
5. Remove from the heat.
6. Place heaping teaspoons of the batter about 5 inches apart on the baking sheets.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until evenly browned.
8. Using a wide spatula, remove the cookies from the baking sheet immediately and shape as desired into tightly rolled cigarettes, fans, or allow them to cool and serve flat.
9. Store in airtight containers for up to two days or in the freezer for up to a month.
